info.title: AI Trading OS Platform Foundation API
info.description: HCP-02-approved Phase 1 REST v1 contract. Capability visibility never grants authority.

200.description: Current authenticated session and available tenant contexts
Authoritative context and newly derived capability manifest
Tenants visible through the caller's current memberships

201.description: Tenant, owner membership, default environment, audit evidence, and outbox event committed atomically

200.description: Assignments replaced and permission versions invalidated
Signed current capability manifest; backend authorization remains authoritative

201.description: Validated immutable draft created; activation is separate

200.description: Version activated atomically when policy and approval evidence permit

201.description: Invitation created without exposing token verifiers

post.description: Accept using invitation bearer proof; tenant headers are not authority.

201.description: Representative capability registered through canonical contracts

ErrorForbidden.description: Policy or authorization denied without cross-tenant disclosure

ErrorNotFoundOpaque.description: Resource unavailable; does not disclose existence across tenants

ErrorPreconditionFailed.description: The If-Match resource version is stale

ErrorValidation.description: Schema or compatibility validation failed atomically

ServiceCredentialCreated.description: One-time service credential issuance; plaintext is never returned again
